Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
Bridget McCarthy, Esq. for Plaintiff General Motors Acceptance Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Cristobal Vega Rojas and Ricardo M. Padilla.
Principal $32,481.82
Attorney's fees of $500.00 For the total of $32,981.82.

Judgment signed in open court.
